basic_details.job_title: Utkal University Faculty Recruitment 2026 – Apply Online for Assistant Professor, Associate Professor, Professor Posts
basic_details.short_information: Utkal University, Bhubaneswar has officially released the faculty recruitment notification 2026 for various posts including Assistant Professor, Associate Professor, and Professor across multiple Post-Graduate Departments. This recruitment drive is a great opportunity for candidates with advanced academic qualifications and research experience seeking teaching positions in a prestigious central university. Eligible Indian citizens can apply online through the HIMS portal. The detailed advertisement including department-wise vacancies and reservation positions will be available on the Universit

important_dates.raw: Opening of Online Application: 15-05-2026 Closing of Online Application: 16-06-2026 Last Date for Receipt of Hard Copy (Registered/Speed Post): 29-06-2026

qualification.details: Minimum qualifications, eligibility criteria, and service conditions shall be governed by the UGC Regulations/Notifications, 2018, as amended from time to time .

how_to_apply: The application process is entirely online through the HIMS portal: https://hims.odisha.gov.in/home
After online submission, a hard copy along with all relevant documents must be sent to the Registrar, Utkal University, Vani Vihar, Bhubaneswar-751004, Odisha
Eligible candidates can apply online for Utkal University Faculty 2026 by following these steps:
Register with your email ID and mobile number
Fill in the application form with correct details
Submit the application and take a printout for future reference
important_instructions: Applicants are advised to carefully review all eligibility conditions, qualifications, and procedural requirements before submission. The University reserves the right to modify, amend, or cancel the advertisement, either in part or in full, without assigning any reason thereof .

faq.question: Q1. What posts are available under Utkal University Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Utkal University has released vacancies for Assistant Professor, Associate Professor, and Professor posts across various Post-Graduate departments .

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are announced in this recruitment?
faq.answer: The exact number of department-wise vacancies will be available in the detailed advertisement on the University website from 15 May 2026 onwards .

faq.question: Q3. Who is eligible to apply for Utkal University Faculty posts?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates must be Indian citizens with qualifications as per UGC Regulations/Notifications, 2018, including relevant postgraduate and doctoral degrees depending on the post .

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is conducted entirely online through the HIMS portal: https://hims.odisha.gov.in/home

faq.question: Q5. What are the important dates for applying online?
faq.answer: Online applications open on 15 May 2026 and close on 16 June 2026. The last date for receipt of hard copy is 29 June 2026 .

faq.question: Q6. Where should I send the hard copy of the application?
faq.answer: After submitting online, candidates must send a hard copy along with all relevant documents to the Registrar, Utkal University, Vani Vihar, Bhubaneswar-751004, Odisha .

faq.question: Q7. Which departments are included in this recruitment?
faq.answer: Recruitment covers multiple departments including Economics, Anthropology, History, Biotechnology, Commerce, Computer Science, Physics, Chemistry, Law, Management, Library & Information Science, Zoology, and more .

faq.question: Q8. What are the general instructions for applicants?
faq.answer: Applicants should carefully check eligibility conditions, qualifications, and procedural requirements before submission. The University reserves the right to amend, modify, or cancel the advertisement without assigning any reason .
